name: oxphp/stubs
description: OxPHP extension stubs for IDE autocompletion and static analysis (PHPStan, Psalm).

suggest.phpstan/extension-installer: Auto-registers the stubs with PHPStan via extension.neon
suggest.phpstan/phpstan: Static analyzer that uses these stubs to type-check oxphp_* functions
suggest.vimeo/psalm: Static analyzer that can load these stubs via <stubs> in psalm.xml
